entries.text:
Account Command Center
Account Intelligence
Builds a dark-ops console HTML artifact with full account intelligence — contracts, health scores, pipeline, contacts, and more for any company. Generates a comprehensive account brief and executive summary.
Before any customer engagement — get the complete account picture in a single artifact. Use before interlock meetings, QBRs, or any time you need a quick account brief.
account command center
account command center for
account brief
interlock brief

Account Lookup
Account Intelligence
Searches and identifies ServiceNow accounts by name; handles disambiguation and reuses account context across the session.
Used automatically when any skill needs to resolve a company name to an account ID.
look up account
find account
account number

Contact Intelligence Profile
Account Intelligence
Seven views of customer contact data: Card, Dashboard, Top Contacts, Network, Buying Group, Events & Sessions, and Segmentation. Powered by Snowflake CDL.
Identify who's engaged, who's gone dark, and who to activate before a renewal or EBC.
contact profile
top contacts at
buying group
who attended
contact-intelligence

AI Adoption Advisor
Value & Adoption
Post-sale AI adoption coaching for CEG/Sales teams — maturity assessments, use case ID, AI roadmaps, adoption plans, lever suggestions, playbooks, and expert services recommendations.
Customer hasn't activated Now Assist? Get a maturity assessment and recommended enablement path.
AI adoption
Now Assist adoption
AI maturity assessment

Sales-to-Post-Sale Brief
Account Intelligence
Generates a comprehensive sales-to-post-sale handoff brief using opportunity data from Snowflake and product adoption metrics from Value Melody.
New logo just closed — get a full handoff brief before the first CSM call.
handoff brief
sales to post-sale brief
transition brief

AI Renewal Intelligence
Renewals & Pipeline
Account rep-facing renewal advisor offering a 6-option menu: customer landscape, top 3 renewal risks, upsell/cross-sell, renewal outreach email, product footprint flags, and 2–3 page renewal summary.
Renewal coming up — get a risk assessment, upsell angles, and a draft outreach in one workflow.
renewal insights
renewal prep
renewal risks
renewal advisor
renewal flags

Value Melody Coach
Value & Adoption
Post-API reference guide for value analysis execution — formatting, analysis instructions, and core behaviors after VE_Pipeline returns data.
Building a business case or BVA — this orchestrates the full value deliverable end to end.
business case
SVP
BVA
value narrative for

Value Melody Analyst
Value & Adoption
Primary workflow for creating value deliverables: business cases, SVPs, BVAs, value narratives, and value realization tracking. Controls workflow over the Analyst skill when both are loaded.
After Value Melody data returns — use this to structure, format, and present the output correctly. Helps customers understand the value they are getting from ServiceNow.
Value Melody
Hey Melody
Hi Melody

Analytics Data Connector
System
Retrieves opportunity, territory, and account analytics from Snowflake. No direct user triggers — routed to automatically by other skills.
Powers the data behind Territory Planning, Weekly Momentum, Deal Review, and other data-driven skills.
analytics data connector

AI Coach — Meeting Prep
Coaching & Strategy
Meeting briefs, talking points, and discussion strategies — quick 30-sec or comprehensive 2–3 min. Includes strategic event briefs for K26, World Forum, Summits, and EBCs.
Before any customer meeting — get a tailored brief with context, agenda, and talking points.
meeting prep
talking points
pre-call brief
KBYG
brief for

AI Coach — Territory Planning
Coaching & Strategy
Generates full FY26 Territory Plans as an HTML file for ServiceNow AEs — Snowflake pipeline data, web research, and account prioritization. Can take up to 10 minutes.
QBR season or new territory assignment — get a data-grounded territory plan in the standard format.
territory planning for
territory plan for
my territory overview

Weekly Momentum Checklist
Renewals & Pipeline
Generates a Weekly Momentum Checklist HTML artifact for an AE with 4 tabs: Summary, In Quarter Pipeline, Out Quarter Pipeline, and Planning Checklist. Takes 3–5 minutes.
Use before Monday 1:1s — surfaces red flags in pipeline before they become problems.
weekly momentum
momentum checklist
1:1 prep
pipeline review for

Deal Review Prep
Renewals & Pipeline
Preps an FLSM/leader for a 1:1 deal review — specific account deals or top 5 by NNACV across a territory, workflow, or account.
Before a deal review 1:1 — get the deal context, health signals, and talking points in under 2 minutes.
deal review prep for
top deals to review for

CEG QBR Generator
Content & Deliverables
Generates CEG Quarterly Business Review PowerPoint decks from Snowflake metrics. Exclusively for requests containing 'CEG' AND one of: QBR, quarterly review, metrics deck.
Generate a QBR-ready deck with live CEG metrics. Say 'CEG QBR' to trigger.
CEG QBR
CEG Quarterly Review
CEG Metrics deck

ServiceNow Corporate PPTX
Content & Deliverables
Creates ServiceNow-branded PowerPoint presentations using the official Corporate Template with Infinite Blue backgrounds, Wasabi Green accents, and glass container layouts.
Any presentation for a customer or exec — get a fully branded SN deck in minutes.
create a presentation
corporate deck
ServiceNow Slides

Smart Brevity DOCX
Content & Deliverables
Enforces smart brevity principles and 2–5 page limits for all Word document creation — reports, briefs, memos, and proposals.
Write a memo or brief — get tight, scannable output with no filler.
write a brief
create a memo
draft a report
word document

HTML Artifact Brand Skill
System
Applies ServiceNow brand guidelines (Infinite Blue, Wasabi Green, typography) to HTML and React artifacts — dashboards, tools, data visualizations, and web interfaces.
Ensures any HTML artifact produced by other skills is automatically on-brand.

SN Brand Standards Reference
System
Ambient brand policy inherited by all downstream content skills — voice, tone, writing style, approved colors, and typography. Also serves as a standalone brand reference.
Ask about ServiceNow brand standards, voice guidelines, or approved colors and fonts.
brand standards
brand colors
brand guidelines
ServiceNow fonts

Ask AI: Account Executive Summary
Account Intelligence
Covers account health, financials, renewals, and pipeline — generated directly from Account 360 in CSP.
To get an up-to-date executive overview of your account directly out of Acct360 in CSP.

Ask AI: Account Adoption Gaps
Value & Adoption
Highlights undeployed ACV and unused licensed products for your account.
To get an overview of adoption gaps for your account directly out of Acct360 in CSP.

Ask AI: Account Handoff Brief
Account Intelligence
Includes deal context, commitments, stakeholders, and risks — generated in CSP.
To get a handoff brief directly out of Acct360 in CSP.

Ask AI: Agentic Business Reframe Plan
Account Intelligence
Generates an Agentic Business Reframe Plan directly from Account 360 in CSP.
To get an Agentic Business Reframe Plan directly out of Acct360 in CSP.

Ask AI: AI Adoption Advisor
Value & Adoption
Creates a post-sales AI Adoption Advisor guide with adoption recommendations and analysis.
To get AI Adoption recommendations and analysis directly out of Acct360 in CSP.

Ask AI: Value Adoption Plan
Value & Adoption
Generates a comprehensive Value Adoption Plan directly from Account 360 in CSP. Shows value realization, adoption progress, and what value the customer is getting from ServiceNow.
To get a value adoption plan directly out of Acct360 in CSP. Use when the customer wants to understand the value they are getting.

Renewal Package Generator
Renewals & Pipeline
Consolidates key renewal and account information in one place, making renewal preparation simpler, easier, and faster.
When you need to prepare for a renewal — navigate to RAM Workspace in CSP and select Generate Renewal Package.

ES Genius
Knowledge
ServiceNow Expert chatbot to answer questions on implementation, best practices, and platform guidance.
To get expert guidance on implementation, best practices, etc.

Customer Dashboard — Asset Generator
Content & Deliverables
Within the Customer Dashboard, click the Generate cell next to your account to access an asset hub where you can generate numerous documents and decks.
When you need to generate documentation for your customer.

Pre-Interlock Intelligence Agent — Account Handoff Brief
Account Intelligence
Generates a handoff brief and structured account brief when a CSM receives a new account assignment. Pulls from Account Plan, Dynamics, Surf, and Customer Dashboard. Delivered directly in CSP before the Interlock, without any manual research. Use for sales-to-post-sale transitions, new account onboarding, and interlock preparation.

QIR Research Agent
Account Intelligence
Auto-generates a comprehensive QIR brief inside CSP by pulling health scores, adoption data, value reports, product metrics, and historical customer context from multiple systems into a single ready-to-use artifact. The CSM can review, adjust, and ask follow-up questions via conversational AI before the meeting.

Post-Meeting Synthesis + Email Management Agent
Account Intelligence
Listens to every customer meeting and automatically generates internal summaries, customer-facing recaps, structured action items, and CSP touchpoints from the raw transcript. Selected customer emails can also be brought into CSP as logged touchpoints.

Resource Connection Agent
Knowledge
Enables CSMs to search across all ServiceNow content sources (Best Practices, SNU, Community, AI Agent Gallery) from a single panel inside CSP and receive cited, customer-ready answers. Functions as an expert chatbot and knowledge base for implementation guidance and best practices. When digital content isn't sufficient, it routes the request to the right internal expert through a structured workflow with tracking and resolution logging.

Portfolio Intelligence Agent
Risk Management
Aggregates escalations, system-generated risk signals, scheduled tasks, and inbound customer outreach into a single ranked action feed on the CSM's landing page. The feed continuously re-ranks accounts and refreshes recommended next-best actions as new signals arrive.

Scheduling Automation Agent
Account Intelligence
Automates meeting coordination across Teams and Zoom by reading account context, identifying the right stakeholders, and surfacing available times across the group. Handles recurring ceremony setup, rules-based triggers, customer self-scheduling links, and automatic availability refresh if no response is received.

CRIR Risk Mitigation Plan Agent
Risk Management
Automatically enriches each incoming CRIR risk record with a draft mitigation plan containing a risk summary, root cause hypothesis, prioritised next-best actions, suggested owners, and links to relevant accelerators. The CSM reviews, adjusts, and activates the plan directly from the risk record.

Value Realization Agent
Value & Adoption
Auto-generates a Value Blueprint for each customer based on their entitlements and business outcomes, and produces a quarterly Value Outcome Review tracking progress against the blueprint with next-best action recommendations. Both are generated automatically at assignment and at QIR time respectively, and are available on demand.

Support Intelligence Agent
Risk Management
Automatically surfaces active support cases, critical escalations, and recurring problem trends across a CSM's account portfolio in their workspace. Delivers proactive P1/P2 alerts and pre-meeting support summaries before every customer-facing call.

Product Adoption Roadmap Agent
Value & Adoption
Generates a personalised adoption roadmap pre-populated with proven sequencing and milestones based on the customer's entitlements, business objectives, and industry context. Identifies adoption gaps and unused licenses to surface undeployed products. The roadmap spans the customer's full ServiceNow product footprint and is available for CSM review and adjustment before any adoption conversation.
